creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Warner Losh from comment #22)

> I'm not sure when it changed

12.3-STABLE does not have the problem. I routinely use MODULES_WITH_WORLD= for minor upgrades to speedup kernel build but disable MODULES_WITH_WORLD for major upgrades.

> I'd support restoring that behavior

Another reason to restore that: now we have inconsistent module builds within or outside kernel build environment. It was consistent before the change.
